name: Big Garlic SL
description: Big Garlic offers high-quality Spanish garlic and emphasizes its commitment to efficient and aesthetically pleasing packaging. They also provide a variety of delicious recipes to help customers enjoy garlic in new and innovative ways.

name: Doreva Produce - Organic Sweet Potatoes & Yams
description: The company is ready to assist with information related to garlic, whether it's about their products or recipes.

name: California Garlic Company
description: Garlic King specializes in a variety of garlic products, including Roast Garlic and IQF Garlic, highlighting their commitment to high-quality, all-natural ingredients. With a focus on customization and timely delivery, they serve customers in the US and Canada.

name: Garland Food LLC
description: Garland Food offers fresh, peeled garlic that is ready to use, making it a convenient ingredient for food service. With over 30 years of experience and a commitment to freshness, they ensure high-quality garlic is available year-round.

name: EgyptSupplier
description: Ahmed Hafez, Egypt Supplier specializes in the export of fresh fruits and vegetables, including garlic. With over 13 years of experience and a strong network of domestic growers, the company ensures regular, high-quality supplies that meet strict quality and sanitary requirements.

name: d'Arta
description: The company highlights its extensive production and export capabilities, sourcing over 70% of its products, including garlic, from local farmers in prime agricultural areas. With multiple production plants across Europe, they offer a diverse range of high-quality products under their own brand and customer labels.

name: Silva International Inc.
description: Silva International offers a variety of high-quality dehydrated garlic products, including chopped, minced, and powdered forms, at wholesale prices.

name: Christopher Ranch - Second Profile (soon to close)
description: Christopher Ranch is a leading manufacturer that specializes in garlic, offering a wide variety of garlic products such as fresh, peeled, and roasted garlic, as well as California heirloom garlic.

name: Pyramid Produce
description: Pyramid Produce is a prominent Egyptian grower and exporter of fresh produce, including garlic, which is part of their diverse year-round offerings.

name: The Garlic Company LLC
description: The Garlic Company, LLC is a prominent supplier of fresh California peeled garlic and offers a variety of premium garlic products, including purees, which enhance culinary experiences for home chefs.
